# headscale_external_user (Data Source)

Looks up an OIDC (external) Headscale user. Optionally creates the user when missing via `create_if_not_exists`.

Requires a Headscale build that accepts `providerId` on `POST /api/v1/user` (e.g. robinjanke/headscale).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "headscale_external_user" "assignee" {
  name                 = "alice"
  provider_id          = "https://auth.example.com/application/o/headscale/59ac9125-c31b-46c5-814e-06242908cf57"
  create_if_not_exists = true
}

resource "headscale_pre_auth_key" "workspace" {
  user           = data.headscale_external_user.assignee.id
  reusable       = true
  time_to_expire = "1h"
}
```

## Schema

### Optional

- `create_if_not_exists` (Boolean) If true, create an OIDC user when none matches. Defaults to `false`.
- `display_name` (String) Display name used when creating the user.
- `email` (String) Email used when creating the user.
- `name` (String) The Headscale username (`preferred_username` from OIDC).
- `profile_picture_url` (String) Profile picture URL used when creating the user.
- `provider_id` (String) OIDC provider identifier (`iss`+`sub`). Required when `create_if_not_exists` is true.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp of the user.
- `id` (String) The Headscale user id.
- `provider` (String) Auth provider of the user (expected: `oidc`).
